title: Custom eggless housewarming cakes for Rosehill and Camellia families
summary:
Moving into a new home in Rosehill or Camellia and need a cake every guest can eat, vegetarian aunty and Jain neighbour included?

Harris Park has made 100% eggless custom cakes since 2019. Not some cakes. Every cake, every time. Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango, finished in buttercream, fondant, or ganache. No one's had to ask since 2019.

48-hour notice, minimum. Fresh means baked to order, not thawed the night before. Pickup from Wigram Street, a short drive from Rosehill and Camellia.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: eggless cake for vegetarian Jain guests Western Sydney
